Short Description: Slow Braised Chicken Thighs with a Moroccan Tagine Sauce and Braised Carrots, Dried Apricots, and Green Olives over Turmeric Basmati Rice
Long Description: Slow braised chicken thighs seasoned with ras el hanout, finished with a preserved lemon tagine sauce, served with braised carrots, dried apricots, and green olives over turmeric basmati rice for a warm, aromatic Moroccan inspired plate with a sweet, briny finish.

Short Description: Grilled Chicken Thighs with a Chimichurri and Roasted Red Bell Peppers and Zucchini over Wild Rice
Long Description: Grilled chicken thighs finished with a bright chimichurri, served with roasted red bell peppers and roasted zucchini over wild rice for a fresh, Argentinian inspired plate with a vibrant, garlicky finish.

Short Description: Slow Braised Short Rib with a Pomegranate Jus and Za'atar Roasted Cauliflower and Roasted Carrots over Herbed Pearl Couscous
Long Description: Slow braised short rib in pomegranate molasses and warm spices, finished with a reduced pomegranate jus, served with za'atar roasted cauliflower and roasted carrots over herbed pearl couscous for a rich, warmly spiced plate with a sweet, savory finish.

Short Description: Pan Seared Salmon with a Lemon Caper Dill Sauce and Roasted Broccoli and Roasted Beets over Lemon Herb Quinoa
Long Description: Pan seared salmon finished with a bright lemon caper dill sauce, served with roasted broccoli and roasted beets over lemon herb quinoa for a clean, Mediterranean inspired plate with a fresh, citrus finish.

Short Description: Seared Tofu in a Creamy Coconut Tikka Masala with Roasted Cauliflower and Chickpeas over Basmati Rice
Long Description: Crispy seared tofu simmered in a creamy coconut tikka masala, served with roasted cauliflower and chickpeas over basmati rice for a warm, aromatic plate with a bold, comforting finish.

Short Description: Our classic high protein and collagen rich chicken bone broth slow simmered for 24 hours
Long Description: Our classic chicken bone broth slow simmered for 24 hours with fresh herbs and spices.

Short Description: Tiramisu chia pudding with a sweet tiramisu style cream topped with a light cocoa dusting
Long Description: Creamy vanilla chia pudding layered with a lightly sweet tiramisu style cream, finished with a light cocoa dusting for a rich, dessert inspired treat.
